title: Modern Lucky Block
description: A Lucky Block mod recreation for modern Minecraft utilizing the datapack system.
body:
See the following link for documentation on how to create a Lucky Block Addon:
https://docs.creoii.dev/lucky-block

# Overview
The Modern Lucky Block mod provides the ability to create Lucky Block addons using only Datapacks for Minecraft 1.20.6+.

Showcase:<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/MZhXlgb1HZA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Questions on how to install addons? See [here](https://docs.creoii.dev/lucky-block/installing-addons).

> **NOTE:** Unlike the original Lucky Block Mod, the Modern Lucky Block Mod does not ship with a default Lucky Block addon. To download the base addon, go [here](https://modrinth.com/datapack/modern-lucky-block-addon).

> **NOTE:** This mod is still in early development. Major changes will still be made, particularly in the structure of JSON files. Addon developers, please keep this in mind.

# Upcoming Features
- Bugfixes
- More provider types

# Why?
The original Lucky Block mod has not been updated in over a year, and is only available for Minecraft 1.20.2 and below. Furthermore, it does not take advantage of the modern tools that Minecraft provides, namely the Datapack system.
